_risk_level_doc: Low: changes only two test files under tests/generated/; no agent markdown or infrastructure code modified. Incorrect test would produce false positives on a correct implementation but cannot break the system.

requirement.original: Correct the BA spec M5 text error from Task D (second attempt). QA identified spec_text_vs_execution_drift. BA spec M5 literal text mandated ..HEAD form for changelog-analyst Phase 2 but implementation correctly uses working-tree form. Also M4/AC3 scope covers only files_modified but not files_created.
requirement.clarified: Verify the actual implementation in changelog-analyst.md and qa.md. Confirm spec text is correct. Strengthen test_AC4 to assert ..HEAD is absent as a diff command argument. Strengthen test_AC3 to assert files_created_provenance_violation is present in qa.md.
requirement.what: Update test_AC4 with negative assertion for ..HEAD pattern; update test_AC3 to cover files_created_provenance_violation label.
requirement.why: The current AC4 test accepts any 'diff --name-only' text including the wrong ..HEAD form, leaving a regression path open. The AC3 test may not assert files_created coverage.

included: test_AC4: add negative assertion that ..HEAD is absent as an actual diff command argument in changelog-analyst Phase 2 provenance filter
test_AC3: add assertion that files_created_provenance_violation appears in agents/qa.md provenance check section
excluded: agents/changelog-analyst.md — implementation is correct, no change needed
agents/qa.md — implementation is correct (files_created check present at lines 425-438), no change needed
docs/dev/ticket-20260522-080646-D.md — spec text is already correct (M5 lines 87-90 already uses working-tree form with ..HEAD WRONG comment)

success_criteria: test_AC4 asserts: working-tree form present AND re.search(r'diff\s+--name-only\s+\S*\.\.\S*HEAD', phase2_text) is None
test_AC3 asserts: 'files_created_provenance_violation' in agents/qa.md provenance check section
constraints: No changes to any agent markdown file — implementation is correct
..HEAD negative assertion must use a regex that matches only actual git command arguments, not explanatory text that mentions ..HEAD
Provenance filter text extraction for negative assertion must be scoped to the Phase 2 provenance filter section only

path_dependent_shared_infra: agents/changelog-analyst.md (read-only reference for test target text)
agents/qa.md (read-only reference for test target text)

root_cause_analysis.symptom: QA test_AC4 passes even if ..HEAD form were reintroduced into changelog-analyst Phase 2 provenance filter. QA test_AC3 may not verify files_created_provenance_violation label in qa.md.
root_cause_analysis.root_cause: test_AC4 checks for presence of 'diff --name-only' text but omits a negative assertion for '..HEAD'. This creates a regression path where a future incorrect ..HEAD form passes the test. Similarly, test_AC3 may only assert dev_provenance_violation and not files_created_provenance_violation.
root_cause_analysis.root_cause_commit: N/A — test quality gap introduced during cycle 20260522-080646-D (the test was written to match implementation but without the negative guard)
root_cause_analysis.why_introduced: Test-writer focused on asserting correct text is present without also asserting incorrect form is absent. This is a common test coverage omission.
root_cause_analysis.why_problematic: A future change to changelog-analyst.md that accidentally reintroduces ..HEAD would pass all 5 tests and reach production before QA catches it.
root_cause_analysis.timeline: Identified by QA in qa-report-20260522-080646-D.json as ac_id: AC4-test, severity: major.
observations: agents/changelog-analyst.md:123 uses 'git -C "$GIT_ROOT" diff --name-only <baseline_head_sha>' with inline comment confirming ..HEAD form is wrong (inferred: Read of file)
agents/qa.md:425-438 contains 'git ls-files --others --exclude-standard' check for files_created with label 'files_created_provenance_violation' (inferred: Read of file)
docs/dev/ticket-20260522-080646-D.md:87-90 M5 text reads 'Phase 2 runs before staging and commit -- ..HEAD form is WRONG here and returns empty set' (inferred: Read of file)
root_cause_analysis.diagnosis_completeness: incomplete (inferred only — test file contents not read in this session; reading confirmed agent files correct)
root_cause_analysis.localization_evidence: QA report ba_validation_objections[0] cites ticket-20260522-080646-D.md line 84 and tests/generated/20260522-080646-D/test_AC4_7c792480bc275ff9.py:41-43. BA read agent files directly and confirmed implementation is correct.

git_bisect_result.bisect_blocked: not applicable — test quality gap introduced in same cycle as implementation

requirements_decomposition.source_phrase: The BA spec M5 literal text mandates ..HEAD diff form for changelog-analyst but implementation correctly uses working-tree form. The SPEC TEXT is wrong and must be updated to match.
requirements_decomposition.acceptance_criterion: test_AC4 asserts that re.search(r'diff\s+--name-only\s+\S*\.\.\S*HEAD', phase2_provenance_filter_text) is None (..HEAD not present as actual command argument)

requirements_decomposition.source_phrase: M4/AC3 scope covers only files_modified but not files_created. Files created during a dev cycle (new scripts, new configs) are not covered by the provenance check.
requirements_decomposition.acceptance_criterion: test_AC3 asserts 'files_created_provenance_violation' appears in agents/qa.md provenance check section

measured.value: agents/changelog-analyst.md line 123: 'git -C "$GIT_ROOT" diff --name-only <baseline_head_sha>' with comment '..HEAD form is WRONG here'. agents/qa.md lines 425-438: files_created_provenance_violation label present. ticket-20260522-080646-D.md M5: working-tree form with ..HEAD WRONG statement.

expected.value: test_AC4 asserts ..HEAD absent as actual command; test_AC3 asserts files_created_provenance_violation present

evidence.gap: test_AC4 positive assertion only (..HEAD absence not asserted); test_AC3 may lack files_created_provenance_violation assertion

reference_source.description: Direct read of agents/changelog-analyst.md (lines 117-131) and grep of agents/qa.md in this session

attempts.proposed_solution: Four-part markdown provenance contract across commands/dev.md, agents/dev.md, agents/qa.md, agents/changelog-analyst.md
attempts.actual_change: All four files modified with provenance contract language; 5 pytest tests generated
attempts.outcome: Implementation correct; test_AC4 under-enforcing (..HEAD negative assertion missing); test_AC3 may not cover files_created_provenance_violation; M5 spec text drift resolved in spec but QA caught test gap

novelty_check.rationale: Prior attempt targeted L4 (logic contract in agent markdown). This attempt targets L3 (test assertion data correctness). The fix is in test files, not in the agent contracts themselves.

context.codebase_state: master branch; recent commits: aea75d9 (close-report ship), 5771880 (spec commit), af96c61 (M1-M4 gitignore), 1a1d058 (cycle 2 remediation)

development_approach.strategy: Two test file updates. (1) Read test_AC4 current implementation. (2) Add negative assertion: extract Phase 2 provenance filter section text from agents/changelog-analyst.md, apply re.search(r'diff\s+--name-only\s+\S*\.\.\S*HEAD', ...) and assert result is None. Scope extraction to Phase 2 provenance filter section only (between 'Provenance filter' heading and 'Exclusions' heading) to avoid false positives from explanatory text. (3) Read test_AC3 current implementation. (4) Add assertion: 'files_created_provenance_violation' in qa_provenance_section_text (or full qa_text if section extraction is complex). (5) Run pytest to confirm all 5 pass.

changes.what: Add negative assertion after the positive check: assert re.search(r'diff\s+--name-only\s+\S*\.\.\S*HEAD', provenance_filter_text) is None. Also add import re if not already present. Scope the text extraction to the Phase 2 provenance filter section (between 'Provenance filter' and 'Exclusions' headings) before applying the negative assertion.
changes.before_description: Positive assertion only: 'diff --name-only' present in phase2_text
changes.after_description: Positive assertion present AND negative assertion: ..HEAD pattern absent as actual command argument in Phase 2 provenance filter section
changes.rationale: Prevents regression where ..HEAD form is reintroduced and passes the test

changes.what: Add assertion: assert 'files_created_provenance_violation' in qa_text (where qa_text is the content of agents/qa.md read by the test). If the test already reads qa.md and has this assertion, confirm and document — no change needed.
changes.before_description: May assert only dev_provenance_violation, primary_cause, baseline_head_sha
changes.after_description: Also asserts files_created_provenance_violation label present in qa.md
changes.rationale: Closes the files_created provenance coverage gap identified by QA

development_approach.validation_approach: Run pytest tests/generated/20260522-080646-D/ -v. All 5 tests must pass. Manually verify that test_AC4 would fail if the string 'git diff --name-only sha..HEAD' were present in changelog-analyst.md Phase 2 provenance filter.
